title: Thyrocare launches new diagnostic laboratory in Prayagraj
summary: Thyrocare Technologies, a leading healthcare diagnostics company in India to have achieved 100 per cent NABL accreditation across all its laboratories, has announced the set-up of its new diagnostic laboratory […]
thbAction: Pitch THB's diagnostics CRM to help labs manage doctor outreach, collection-center expansion, and B2B referral relationships while improving conversion and retention.
contentHtml:
Expands presence in Prayagraj, bringing reliable, accurate, and affordable diagnostic services across the region

Thyrocare Technologies, a leading healthcare diagnostics company in India to have achieved 100 per cent NABL accreditation across all its laboratories, has announced the set-up of its new diagnostic laboratory in Prayagraj, Uttar Pradesh, in association with SecondMedic. 

The new facility was inaugurated by Rajdeep Panwar, Chief Commercial Officer, Thyrocare Technologies Ltd. Prior to this launch, Thyrocare operated three laboratories in Uttar Pradesh, located in Lucknow, Noida, and Varanasi. With the addition of Prayagraj, the company further strengthens access to diagnostic services across the state. 

The new laboratory is equipped  with advanced testing infrastructure and supported by trained professionals, enabling timely and error-free diagnostic results. It caters to both specialised as well as routine testing requirements, offering support to ongoing and  preventive healthcare needs. 

This expansion aligns with the consistent focus of Thyrocare  towards meeting the increasing demand for reliable diagnostic services in emerging markets and bolstering its network. The Prayagraj diagnostic lab further expands the presence of the company in the northern part of the country.

Sharing his thoughts surrounding the launch of the new lab in Prayagraj, Rahul Guha, MD and CEO, Thyrocare said, “At Thyrocare, we envision making trustworthy and state-of-the-art diagnostic services attainable for every Indian household. The rollout of our new facility indicates our persistent efforts for expanding our presence while mitigating diagnostic gaps through a patient-focused and technology-led approach.” 

Rajdeep Panwar, Chief Commercial Officer, Thyrocare shared, “Our focus in markets such as Prayagraj is on enhancing door-step delivery and guaranteeing that both healthcare partners and patients have access to reliable and prompt diagnostic services. This facility  enables us to expand as well as strengthen our reach in the region while sustaining the turnaround and quality standards that Thyrocare is known for.”

With this launch, Thyrocare continues to expand its presence in Uttar Pradesh, with an emphasis on growing the accessibility of diagnostic services  across cities beyond the metro markets. Thyrocare remains committed to strengthening its network and bringing reliable healthcare services closer to patients.
